title: Shinji Kisses Hikari Scene
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Kisses Hikari Scene             Quote Post by LordThaeon » Mon Jan 14, 2013 3:51 pm I think this was in one of the spin-off games or something, but I remember seeing a scene where Shinji kisses Hikari with a corny background and violin key and then Hikari yells at him and slaps him. I swear that I'm not making any of that up, but I can't find the scene! Does anyone have any inkling as to where I should even look?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 14, 2013 4:22 pm It's from the so called "Evangelion First Impression", actually it was called just "Neon Genesis Evangelion", game for Sega Saturn which got re-released as "interactive" DVD-Video in 2004 (I own the later). Observe the virility of amnesiac Shinji and laugh, laugh as hard as you can: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:07 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: It's from the so called "Evangelion First Impression", actually it was called just "Neon Genesis Evangelion", game for Sega Saturn which got re-released as "interactive" DVD-Video in 2004 (I own the later). Observe the virility of amnesiac Shinji and laugh, laugh as hard as you can: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:12 pm Moving this accordingly to the "Everything Else Evangelion" forum for video games and other related works.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:25 pm ...and then Asuka loses her shit completely, I assume?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:28 pm Holy mother of Shinji, this thread scared the Eva-loving crap out of me when I saw it in Chit-Chat. For a solid hour I thought this was a misplaced 3.0 spoiler thread. Phew. Thank Lilith that's over.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:37 pm Do the fourth and fifth picture suffer from sameface syndrome or am I imagining it? Not that it's uncommon for Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 14, 2013 5:56 pm animated  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:01 pm NemZ wrote: ...and then Asuka loses her shit completely, I assume?

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:35 pm Sounds like a fun game. Did it show Touji's reaction to that kiss, or is he not in the picture (figuratively speaking)?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Jan 14, 2013 8:45 pm god, this is so wrong

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Mon Jan 14, 2013 8:48 pm Even Hikari is, "do not want!"

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:24 pm I just... wow. It never occurred to me that Shinji and Hikari... Oh, I give up. Why does Anno do this to us? It seems like he's just trying to screw the rest of us over with cutesy stuff while he schemes about his next movie. By the way, I am 100% amused. Asuka's reaction and Shinji's face... priceless.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:37 pm ...and where is Rei during all of this?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:47 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Why does Anno do this to us?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jan 15, 2013 4:57 am Ambrosia wrote: Sounds like a fun game. Did it show Touji's reaction to that kiss, or is he not in the picture (figuratively speaking)?

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Jan 22, 2013 4:59 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: It's from the so called "Evangelion First Impression", actually it was called just "Neon Genesis Evangelion", game for Sega Saturn which got re-released as "interactive" DVD-Video in 2004 (I own the later). Observe the virility of amnesiac Shinji and laugh, laugh as hard as you can: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jan 22, 2013 9:28 am Poor Hikari. She already has her main squeeze, and now to have Shinji forced upon her . . . Hyper Shinchan wrote: Staying away from Asuka, if he just remembered this basic rule he could have avoided some embarrassing situations.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jan 22, 2013 11:46 am Bagheera wrote: I know, right? So much better to get your heart torn out and end the world than get embarrassed by a girl .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jan 22, 2013 11:52 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Just avoiding a certain wicked girl would have helped in preserving part of Shinji's mental sanity.
